title: neolitsea teschneriana
intro: Neolitsea teschneriana is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, commonly known as the sandpaper tree due to its rough bark. The medicinal properties of Neolitsea teschneriana are attributed to its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Neolitsea teschneriana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in traditional herbal remedies to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
